summary: 23 qualifying stories scanned; 10 concrete items surfaced after 90-day history dedupe.

items.name: Claude Fable 5
items.summary: Anthropic's latest model release, with early testers praising stronger agentic coding and cleaner UI polish.
items.why_included: Strong early hands-on reactions, not just launch hype.
items.evidence: One tester said the frontend felt more intentionally crafted, and another said it crunches through very difficult problems quickly.

items.name: Cost.dev
items.source_story_title: Show HN: Cost.dev (YC W21) – making agents cost-aware and cheaper to call
items.summary: Cost.dev helps make agent loops cost-aware and cheaper to call.
items.why_included: The thread had clear product discussion about pricing an agent loop.
items.evidence: Commenters focused on making cloud cost a first-class constraint and on clearer, visible estimates.

items.name: ColGREP
items.source_story_title: Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search
items.summary: ColGREP is a local semantic code-search CLI for agents.
items.why_included: Directly recommended as a practical replacement for grep in agent workflows.
items.evidence: A commenter said they use ColGREP as a daily driver and like its regex-plus-semantic ranking.

items.name: CadQuery
items.source_story_title: Unified Controllable and Faithful Text-to-CAD Generation with LLMs
items.summary: CadQuery is a Python parametric CAD framework for editable STEP models.
items.why_included: A concrete tool that commenters said works in real CAD generation.
items.evidence: A commenter said they had good success using CadQuery with Python to generate basic shapes and editable STEP files.

items.name: ZeroSSL
items.source_story_title: Let's Encrypt bans certificate usage in any US sanctioned territory [pdf]
items.summary: ZeroSSL is a certificate authority service suggested as an EU alternative to Let's Encrypt.
items.why_included: Explicitly recommended as a fallback CA under policy pressure.
items.evidence: A commenter asked about ZeroSSL and called it a good EU alternative.

items.name: Actalis
items.source_story_title: Let's Encrypt bans certificate usage in any US sanctioned territory [pdf]
items.summary: Actalis is an Italian certificate authority suggested as an EU alternative to Let's Encrypt.
items.why_included: An explicit CA alternative from the policy thread.
items.evidence: A commenter posted Actalis and called it a good EU alternative.

items.name: OpenCV 5
items.source_story_title: OpenCV 5 Is Here: The Biggest Leap in Years for Computer Vision
items.summary: OpenCV 5 is the latest computer-vision release with ongoing ONNX engine work.
items.why_included: A mature release with practical developer commentary.
items.evidence: Commenters said OpenCV is still their default for loading images and video, and discussed where the new engine fits.

items.name: REBOUND
items.source_story_title: Show HN: Gravity – interactive solar-system simulator, from Newton to Einstein
items.summary: REBOUND is an open-source N-body simulator for astrophysical dynamics.
items.why_included: A stronger scientific alternative surfaced in a visualization thread.
items.evidence: A commenter said it is what they use for n-body simulations and called it easy to use from C or Python.

items.name: Gravity
items.source_story_title: Show HN: Gravity – interactive solar-system simulator, from Newton to Einstein
items.summary: Gravity is an interactive solar-system simulator from Newton to Einstein.
items.why_included: The simulator got positive visual and technical feedback.
items.evidence: Commenters praised the presentation and suggested pairing it with REBOUND for rigorous n-body work.

items.name: GentleOS
items.source_story_title: Show HN: GentleOS – A pair of hobby OSes for vintage 32-bit and 16-bit PCs
items.summary: GentleOS is a hobby OS pair for vintage 16-bit and 32-bit PCs.
items.why_included: Retrocomputing commenters showed real interest and follow-up ideas.
items.evidence: Commenters wanted to power up vintage IBM PCs again and suggested adding an Uxn emulator.
